About this Collectable

The Citroën 2CV is one of the most iconic French cars ever built. Designed for simple, reliable and affordable mobility, the 2CV combines its charming appearance with practical features and a characterful driving experience. The 2CV6 Special adds extra comfort and recognizable details.

This example is a Citroën 2CV6 Special from 1986, finished in blue. The Special version is known for its improved interior, robust technology and subtle style accents, which make this 2CV stand out within the model's long production line.

Thanks to its lightweight construction, rear-wheel drive and simple engineering, the 2CV6 offers a relaxed and authentic driving experience. Open-top driving with the distinctive convertible roof reinforces the nostalgic character, while the timeless design ensures lasting charm. A true classic that symbolizes French craftsmanship and playful driving pleasure.

Technical details

The Citroën 2CV6 Special is equipped with an air-cooled 602 cc two- or four-cylinder (depending on version) petrol engine, coupled to a manual transmission. The rear-wheel drive and lightweight construction make it particularly agile and enjoyable to use.

Mercedes-Benz C 220 CDI – built to keep driving

Some cars prove their quality not with low mileage, but with the fact that they have covered almost 300,000 km without any problems. This Mercedes-Benz C 220 CDI is a perfect example of this.

Under the hood is the famous 2.2 CDI diesel engine, a power source that is known within Mercedes for its long life and mechanical solidity. This engine was designed not only for comfort, but above all for long-distance use.

What gives this car extra confidence is its full service history within the official Mercedes-Benz dealer network. Every maintenance was carried out correctly and according to factory instructions, so the car always received the care it needed. No doubt about maintenance, no gaps in history — everything is neatly documented.

Thanks to the automatic gearbox, the car still drives smoothly and comfortably, both in city traffic and on the highway. The combination of leather, automatic air conditioning, navigation and parking sensors makes it not only reliable, but also pleasant to use on a daily basis.

This Mercedes is not a "disposable car", but a real mile-eater: built to go many kilometers further. Ideal for those looking for a reliable, honest car with proven quality and a transparent history.
